prestazioni: BMW B48C20T0 (2.0L turbocharged inline-4) hybrid turbo upgrade to Garrett GT3076R Gen II with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate for 380whp on E85 with 28psi peak boost
Full bolt-on intake system from Eventuri Carbon Fiber JCW Clubman intake with heat-shielded ram-air ducting and custom 3.5" velocity stack for optimized airflow at 7,500 RPM redline
Wavetrac limited-slip differential with 45% lockup under power, paired with MFactory 2.75:1 final drive ratio and Quaife ATB helical LSD for launch control optimization on semi-slick tires
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Clubman widebody conversion with carbon fiber fender flares, extended wheel arches (35mm front, 40mm rear), and custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with JCW Racing Stripes in gloss black

OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 18x9.5" ET35 wheels with 245/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires, paired with KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with 15-way adjustable rebound and 12-way adjustable compression
Rear diffuser from Maxton Design with integrated twin 3.5" titanium exhaust tips from Akrapovic Evolution Line, replacing the stock JCW exhaust system for a 12dB deeper tone and 18% weight reduction
